testcase.name: test_event_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studio_stream_delete.py:78: in test_event_order assert "iter_done" in types E AssertionError: assert 'iter_done' in ['start', 'iter_start']

testcase.name: test_iter_done_has_score
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studio_stream_delete.py:90: in test_iter_done_has_score iter_done = next(e for e in streamed_prompt["events"] if e.get("type") == "iter_done") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E StopIteration

testcase.name: test_final_result_indonesian

failure.message: AssertionError: no final.result frame assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studio_stream_delete.py:97: in test_final_result_indonesian assert fr is not None, "no final.result frame" E AssertionError: no final.result frame E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_end_frame

failure.message: AssertionError: did not see 'event: end' frame assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studio_stream_delete.py:105: in test_end_frame assert streamed_prompt["saw_end"], "did not see 'event: end' frame" E AssertionError: did not see 'event: end' frame E assert False

testcase.name: test_prompt_appears_in_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studio_stream_delete.py:114: in test_prompt_appears_in_list pid = fr["id"] ^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_delete_prompt_and_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studio_stream_delete.py:122: in test_delete_prompt_and_404 pid = fr["id"] ^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable
